Diff contains only run metadata updates in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-6/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-6/run.json`; no implementation files were changed, and I did not find a new correctness, safety, or robustness regression introduced by this commit.
